task_completion.description: Extract the raw campaign ZIP archive
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an archive manager or file manager showing the extraction of '/home/ga/Documents/summer_campaign_raw.zip'.
Look for an image editing or batch processing application showing the image width being set to exactly 1080 pixels while maintaining the aspect ratio.

task_completion.description: Save resized images to the Processed_Campaign directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window displaying the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Processed_Campaign' containing the 10 resized image files.
Look for a web browser navigated to http://localhost showing the Socioboard dashboard, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Socioboard Media/Image Library
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Socioboard interface showing the Media or Image Library section.

task_completion.description: Upload the 10 resized images to Socioboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file upload dialog selecting the 10 images from the Processed_Campaign folder, or the Socioboard Media Library displaying the 10 newly uploaded images.

integrity.description: Agent used GUI tools for image extraction and resizing
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used graphical applications (e.g., Archive Manager, GIMP, or a GUI batch resizer) rather than terminal commands like 'unzip' or 'mogrify'.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with Socioboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the login and upload processes were performed manually in a web browser, not via terminal scripts, curl commands, or automated API calls.

integrity.description: Agent uploaded files from the correct processed directory
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the file upload dialog to ensure the agent is selecting files specifically from '/home/ga/Documents/Processed_Campaign/' and not the raw extracted folder or another location.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The raw archive is located at '/home/ga/Documents/summer_campaign_raw.zip'. The processed images must be saved in '/home/ga/Documents/Processed_Campaign'. Exactly 10 images must be processed and uploaded. The target width for the resized images is exactly 1080 pixels.
